meta_title: For Freelancers: debugging with AI to Solve overwhelmed by AI tools (Advanced Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome overwhelmed by AI tools. A Advanced-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: overwhelmed by AI tools

content.seo_title: Debugging with AI: Master Strategy for Freelance Developers
content.seo_description: Stop drowning in AI tools. Learn a professional workflow for debugging with AI using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship faster and impress your clients.
content.answer_block: Stop chasing every new AI tool. Consolidate your workflow by using Claude Code for deep CLI debugging and Antigravity for architectural analysis. By integrating these into your terminal, you treat your codebase as a queryable database, reducing resolution time from hours to minutes and ensuring professional-grade code quality.
content.intro:
The modern freelance developer is drowning in a graveyard of 'productivity' tools. You wake up to a dozen new LLM wrappers, yet your production bugs remain stubborn, and your client deadlines are tighter than ever. The noise is deafening, and the cognitive load of switching between tabs is killing your velocity.

But the elite 1% of builders aren't using more tools—they are using deeper ones. By treating your terminal as a command center and your codebase as a structured knowledge base, you reclaim control. It is time to stop being a passive user of AI and start being an architect of your own automated debugging pipeline.

steps.title: Contextualize the Repository
steps.description: Before debugging, you must map the architectural debt. Use Claude Code to build a mental model of the project structure to avoid blind patches.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this repository structure for high-coupling modules. Identify potential circular dependencies that might cause runtime errors.

steps.title: Isolate the Failure Vector
steps.description: Don't guess where the bug lives. Use automated log analysis to narrow the search space before asking for a fix.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Compare the current stack trace against the codebase logic. Identify the specific function responsible for the state mutation error.

steps.title: Draft the Surgical Fix
steps.description: Use Claude Code to propose a patch that adheres to existing design patterns rather than introducing 'AI-hallucinated' boilerplate.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a refactor for this module that fixes the race condition while maintaining current type safety standards.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit src/services/auth.ts --instructions 'Fix the race condition in the verifyToken function'

steps.title: Verify with Automated Tests
steps.description: Never ship a fix without ensuring the regression suite passes. Automate your test execution to validate the fix immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review these failing test cases and suggest necessary mocks to isolate the logic changes.

steps.title: Final Architectural Audit
steps.description: Perform a final check to ensure the fix doesn't introduce technical debt or violate the project's established conventions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a code review on the latest commit. Check for performance regressions and maintainability concerns.

pro_tips: Alias your most common Antigravity debug prompts to your shell config for instant execution.
Always force Claude Code to output 'Explain your reasoning' before writing code to prevent hallucinated logic.
Use a dedicated 'AI-Context' file in your root to store project-specific business rules that Claude should always follow.
When debugging production issues, always pipe your staging logs directly into the Claude Code context window.
Keep your context window clean by periodically clearing Claude's memory of non-relevant files using the CLI reset command.
resources: Effective Prompt Engineering for Code: https://github.com/features/copilot
content.next_steps: Now that you have your pipeline, audit your current project's technical debt by running a full repository scan with Claude Code and documenting the top three critical bottlenecks.
content.conversion_block: You have the blueprint to stop guessing and start building with precision. Don't let another deadline slip due to inefficient debugging. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
